data.title: 国际服卡池「Heehee... I saw something wonderful because I came to the ocean with you. Thank you, Sensei.」

data.body:
[Pick Up Recruitment Preview]

A New Unique Pick-Up Recruitment starts 1/31 (Tue)!
Target Pick-Up Student: 3★ Hoshino (Swimsuit)

Schedule: 1/31 (Tue) After Maintenance–2/5 (Sun) 1:59 AM (UTC)
※ Probability for 3★ students are increased from 3% > 6% during this event period!![rozn3p1z8nRgvmkUzLBSfpSHdtHMVyT9.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/rozn3p1z8nRgvmkUzLBSfpSHdtHMVyT9.jpg)
